config.name: Social Media Assistant
config.description: Shows how your content is performing across various social media platforms.
config.author: QuarkA

messages.0: Let's take a look at your social media performance. Choose a time range to begin.
messages.10: Here’s what happened over the past {$free} days.
messages.20: No social media traffic was detected for the selected period. Would you like to choose a different timeframe?
messages.21: Most of the traffic is coming from {$top_media}.
messages.30: Reviewing landing pages that received traffic from social media. Which platform would you like to focus on?
messages.40: Here are the landing pages that received social media traffic in the past {$free} days.
messages.50: Click a link to view posts from the corresponding account. You may also consider reaching out directly.
messages.60: Here is a summary of social media platforms that are directly contributing to revenue.
messages.70: It looks like YouTube is driving the most revenue. Next, let's review the accounts on each platform that contributed to that revenue. Please select a social media platform.
messages.80: These are the Instagram accounts contributing to your revenue.
messages.90: Click a link to view the corresponding account’s posts. You may also consider connecting directly.
messages.100: That concludes the social media overview. Consider engaging with users who interacted with your posts, or explore using social media ads to expand your reach.
